channel.title: practice on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in practice on David's Blog

item.title: Backup Blogs with Git
item.description: Problem I have On github shwezhu.github.io repository I have two branch already, one is master for static html files that is generate web page, another is backup for backup of my hexo themes files and blogs. I want backup the hugo theme files with my blog files. Solution I’m using hugo now but I don’t want to override or delete the theme files for hexo, therefore, I cannot just fetch remote branch backup and merge it with my local branch and then push.

item.title: little tricks in golang
item.description: 1. map[string]int 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 // Dup1 prints the text of each line that appears more than // once in the standard input, preceded by its count. counts := make(map[string]int) input := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin) for input.Scan() { counts[input.Text()]++ }

item.title: pushed a wrong file to github - solved
item.description: 问题描述 写完博客把内容 push 到了 GitHub, 发现有个文件 a.txt 不应该被追踪, a.txt 已经被追踪了, 原因分析 首先你可能会想到 直接在本地删除 a.txt commit, 然后 push 就行了, 可是即使这

item.title: Golang Web - A Simple GPTBot with Openai API
item.description: Introduction Source Code: gptbot 1. gorilla/session bugs 1.1. encode before save When try to save data in session, we usually use the Values field of session, for example, 1 session.Values["username"] = "Jack" The first problem I came across is that, you can save int, bool, string and other basic value into session.Values[] directly, but when you try to assign other type value, custom object, array to session.Values["xxx"] for example, you

item.title: os.Getenv() function
item.description: 什么是环境变量 开发程序的时候会用到一些密钥, 如 session key 用来加密解密一个会话 session message, 再比如拿到 openai 的密钥用来与 gpt 对话, 把这些 key 提交到 GitHub 是很危险的, 所以一

item.title: push to github get rejected - solved
item.description: 问题描述 在 GitHub 新建一个 repository, 并选择了自动创建 README.md, 在本地初始化项目后进行push, 报错: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 $ git push -u origin master To github.com:shwezhu/gptbot.git ! [rejected] master -> master (fetch first) error: failed to push some refs to

item.title: Go并发学习之实现一个Worker Pool
item.description: 谷歌Go组的一个大佬Bryan C. Mills认为Worker Pool在go里是anti-pattern, 不管怎样, 先实现一个简单版本来帮助理解

item.title: 用Go实现一个简单的贪吃蛇
item.description: Go也学了几天了, 在学习泛型和并发之前打算实践一下, 熟悉一下语法, 不然一直理论没有实践是很容易学懵的, 实现思路如下: 地图 地图就是个二维数组b
